data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The interface minimizes choices to improve decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation with categorized browsing options.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Interactive elements are placed within easy reach to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design elements and easily clickable buttons.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Constant engagement in line with users’ cognitive capacity.
data.technical_spec: Recommendation engine designed to limit choice to 7-10 options.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design to improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Use of high-quality images and intuitive layouts.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Key recommendations are strategically placed for optimal recall.
data.technical_spec: Content highlighted based on user preferences and viewing history.
